case_title: ANA PAULA GOULART VS. VIEN LA CUONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY GOULART, ANA PAULA AS TO DEFENDANT CUONG, VIEN LA DBA FIVE STAR NAILS AND SPA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY GOULART, ANA PAULA CUONG, VIEN LA DBA FIVE STAR NAILS AND SPA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JUN-25-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CUONG, VIEN LA DBA FIVE STAR NAILS AND SPA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2008 BY PRO TEM COMMISSIONER RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOULART, ANA PAULA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUONG, VIEN LA DBA FIVE STAR NAILS AND SPA $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $5.03 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $780.03, DEFENDANT LIABLE FOR REASONABLE DAMAGES ONLY; $80.00 FOR LOST WAGES, $20.00 FOR TIPS, $60.00 FOR MEDICAL BILL, AND $540.00 FOR PAIN AND SUFFERING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CUONG, VIEN LA DBA FIVE STAR NAILS AND SPA
